args: set -eo pipefail; root="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}"; case "$root" in ''|*'$'*) root=''; while IFS= read -r d; do if [ -x "$d/bin/ensure-ripvec-mcp.sh" ]; then root="$d"; break; fi; done < <(find "$HOME/.codex/plugins/cache" "$HOME/.claude/plugins/cache" -path '*/ripvec/*' -type d -prune 2>/dev/null | sort -Vr) ;; esac; if [ -z "$root" ] || [ ! -x "$root/bin/ensure-ripvec-mcp.sh" ]; then echo "ripvec plugin root not found; expected host plugin-root substitution or an installed ripvec plugin under ~/.codex/plugins/cache or ~/.claude/plugins/cache" >&2; exit 1; fi; exec "$root/bin/ensure-ripvec-mcp.sh" "$@"
